response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a senior software developer, which doesn't match the junior/mid-level requirement. Their experience is also primarily with technologies and roles that are beyond the job description's focus.
strengths: Experience with various technologies and frameworks
concerns: Senior level experience doesn't match junior/mid-level position
Most experience is with technologies not directly relevant to the job
Location in Kenya, while the job requires high on-site presence in Berlin
